SRC-001-google-style.notes: Highest yield source — 4 sub-pages consulted, 7 recommendations generated. The notices and cross-references pages were especially relevant to the permission documentation task.

SRC-002-diataxis.notes: Conditional imperatives pattern (REC-004) directly applicable to dual-audience challenge. 'How to' title recommendation blocked by INV-style-100. Moderate yield.

SRC-003-microsoft-style.notes: Step-by-step and global audience writing tips directly applicable. Accessibility overview page too shallow to generate recommendations.
